data.title: Hexaware Technologies opens new delivery center in Cairo with 100 professionals to strengthen its global presence.
data.description: On December 4, 2025, Hexaware Technologies (NSE: HEXT), a leading provider of digital and IT solutions worldwide, expanded its global delivery network by opening a new center in Cairo. The center commenced operations with an initial team of 100 professionals. This move is aimed at enhancing the company's service capabilities and extending its reach to clients in various regions.

data.title: Cosmos ATOM price may hit $3.20, up 35%, in 4-6 weeks after rebounding from $2.14 support level.
data.description: A forecast for ATOM suggests a possible 35% increase to $3.20 in the next 4-6 weeks as Cosmos rebounds from oversold conditions. However, to maintain a bullish trend, it is crucial for ATOM to sustain the $2.14 support level.

data.title: UNI price may reach $8.16 by Dec 2025 with 34% potential gain in 4 weeks, despite bearish MACD signals for Uniswap.
data.description: A forecast for UNI's price suggests a possible 34% increase to reach the $8.16 resistance level in the next four weeks. However, investors in Uniswap are advised to exercise caution due to bearish MACD signals.

data.title: Bitcoin Cash aims for $625 price target with technical signals indicating 15% potential upside from current $591.50 levels.
data.description: Analysts are optimistic about the short-term future of BCH as they predict a target price of $625.90, indicating a strong bullish momentum. Currently priced at $591.50, technical analysis suggests a potential upward trajectory for BCH.

data.title: Chainlink predicts $18-20 recovery by December 2025, requires $14.93 breakout for bullish trend.
data.description: Forecasters are anticipating a potential rise in the price of LINK cryptocurrency, aiming for a target of $18.26. Despite facing bearish trends, analysts highlight the importance of breaking through the critical resistance level of $14.93 to sustain a bullish momentum.

data.title: ZTE CDO Cui Li discusses AI at Economist Impact's event in Singapore. ZTE Corp: 0763.HK / 000063.SZ.
data.description: ZTE Corporation, a prominent global provider of integrated information and communication technology solutions, revealed that its Chief Development Officer, Cui Li, discussed at AI Innovation Asia 2025, organized by Economist Impact. ZTE's stock is listed as 0763.HK on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange and 000063.SZ on the Shenzhen Stock Exchange. The event took place in Singapore on December 4, 2025.

data.title: Global automated manual transmission market projected to reach USD 28.6 billion by 2034 at 5.2% CAGR driven by fuel efficiency and ease of driving.
data.description: The global market for automated manual transmission is witnessing significant growth driven by a rise in emphasis on fuel efficiency and reduced emissions, improved ease of driving in congested areas, and an increasing adoption in commercial fleet and taxi services. This trend is particularly evident in WILMINGTON, Del., as of Dec. 4, 2025, as reported by Allied Market Research. The report highlights important numbers reflecting the growing popularity and demand for this technology in the automotive industry.
